summary: Completed backend testing of Quadley Mobile App bug fixes and new features. All 25 tests passed (100% success rate). All P0, P1, and P2 features verified working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Test data created with 'TEST' prefix for announcements, maintenance requests, shoutouts, late meal requests, jobs, and safe disclosures
context_for_next_testing_agent: All bug fixes verified working: 1) Announcements accept both 'is_emergency' and 'emergency' fields for mobile compatibility, 2) Maintenance GET includes super_admin/superadmin/college_admin in role check, 3) Shoutouts support both web (to_user_name) and mobile (recipient_name) field names, 4) Late meal requests accept optional dietary_requirements and reason fields, 5) Jobs pay_rate is optional, 6) Annual disclosure report endpoints working correctly with aggregated data

P0_announcements.details: Admin can post normal and emergency announcements. Both 'is_emergency' and 'emergency' fields accepted for mobile compatibility.

P1_maintenance_get.details: Maintenance GET works for all admin roles including super_admin, superadmin, and college_admin.

P1_shoutouts.details: Shoutouts GET and POST work for all users. Mobile format with recipient_name supported alongside web format with to_user_name.

P2_late_meal_request.details: Late meal requests accept meal_type, date, and optional dietary_requirements. Reason field also optional for mobile compatibility.

job_creation.details: Job creation works with pay_rate as optional field.

annual_disclosure_report.details: GET /api/safe-disclosures/annual-report returns available years. GET /api/safe-disclosures/annual-report/{year} returns aggregated report with proper structure.
